name: Shenhe | Your New 'Client'
description:
OPTIONAL NETORI

"... Are cloth measurements supposed to be this... handsy?"

——————————————

It was just another day, another dollar. But who knew that Shenhe, the beauty of Jueyun Karst, would show up at your doorstep, requesting your services? It is up to you whether you want it to turn to slice-of-life, or something... else.

This bot and scenario are based on nmiller162's Shenhe NTR bot. I personally thought it would be interesting if it were the other way around, from another perspective, with you being the one who could NTR or not. The boyfriend is Aether in this case.

For a better overall experience and long-term roleplaying, please use Deepseek V3 0324, R1T, or any other LLM that has context over >32k tokens.

This is my first bot. Feedback and calling out mistakes/flaws are greatly appreciated!

<3

creator: Wandering Agent
